package rulefixtures

import (
	jwt "github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
)

// scenario for jwt_none_algorithm_risk: JWT verification code that accepts `"none"` or `alg: ""` as valid signing methods, or uses `jwt.Parse` without `WithValidMethods`
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: error.
func scenario722Negative(token string) (*jwt.Token, error) {
	return jwt.Parse(token, func(t *jwt.Token) (interface{}, error) { return []byte("secret"), nil }, jwt.WithValidMethods([]string{"HS256"}))
}
